description.en: Start your day with a peaceful walk through the farm. Visit the vegetable gardens, fruit orchards, and enjoy the fresh morning air.
description.my: Mulakan hari anda dengan jalan santai di ladang. Lawati taman sayur-sayuran, dusun buah-buahan, dan nikmati udara pagi yang segar.
description.zh: 以宁静的农场漫步开启新的一天，参观菜园、果园，享受清晨的新鲜空气。

description.en: Get your hands dirty! Pick your own fruits and vegetables straight from the field, and learn organic farming techniques from Uncle Voo himself.
description.my: Kotor tangan anda! Petik buah-buahan dan sayur-sayuran sendiri terus dari ladang, dan pelajari teknik pertanian organik daripada Pak Voo sendiri.
description.zh: 亲身体验！直接从田间采摘水果和蔬菜，跟着伍叔叔学习有机农耕技术。

description.en: Meet our friendly farm animals! Feed the goats, collect eggs from the chicken coop, and learn about sustainable animal care.
description.my: Temui haiwan ladang kami yang mesra! Beri makan kambing, kutip telur dari reban ayam, dan pelajari penjagaan haiwan yang lestari.
description.zh: 认识我们友善的农场动物！喂山羊、收集鸡蛋，学习可持续动物护理。
